name: MIDI Triggers
description: This algorithm generates gates and triggers from MIDI or I2C note messages.

specifications.name: Channels
specifications.description: The number of triggers to generate.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Sets whether to generate a trigger from note on messages, or a gate from note on/off messages.

parameters.name: Length
parameters.description: The length of the trigger pulse.

parameters.name: Velocity
parameters.description: Sets whether to apply velocity scaling to the trigger/gate magnitude.

parameters.name: Min level
parameters.description: If applying velocity scaling, the voltage corresponding to minimum velocity.

parameters.name: Note number
parameters.description: The note number to respond to, or ‘Any’.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: ES-5 Expander
parameters.description: If set, the ES-5 expander header to use for output instead of the bus specified by the Output parameter. “1” means the ES-5 itself.

output_ports.name: ES-5 Output
output_ports.description: If using an ES-5 expander output, sets which of the 8 outputs on the expander to use.
